test.create_query: CREATE TABLE rs_right_100k (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_10m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_100k_nullable (k UInt64, a Nullable(Int32), b Nullable(Int64), c Nullable(UInt8), d Nullable(Float64), e Nullable(UInt32), f Nullable(Int16), g Nullable(FixedString(16)), h Nullable(Int8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_10m_nullable (k UInt64, a Nullable(Int32), b Nullable(Int64), c Nullable(UInt8), d Nullable(Float64), e Nullable(UInt32), f Nullable(Int16), g Nullable(FixedString(16)), h Nullable(Int8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_1m_x10 (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, e UInt32, f Int16, g FixedString(16), h Int8) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_1m_nullable_x10 (k UInt64, a Nullable(Int32), b Nullable(Int64), c Nullable(UInt8), d Nullable(Float64), e Nullable(UInt32), f Nullable(Int16), g Nullable(FixedString(16)), h Nullable(Int8)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_right_mixed_10m (k UInt64, a Int32, b Int64, c UInt8, d Float64, s1 String, s2 String, s3 String) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()

CREATE TABLE rs_right_wide_10m (k UInt64, i0 Int64, i1 Int64, i2 Int64, i3 Int64, i4 Int64, i5 Int64, i6 Int64, i7 Int64, f0 Float64, f1 Float64, f2 Float64, f3 Float64, f4 Float64, f5 Float64, f6 Float64, f7 Float64, s0 FixedString(32), s1 FixedString(32), s2 FixedString(32), s3 FixedString(32), s4 FixedString(32), s5 FixedString(32), s6 FixedString(32), s7 FixedString(32), s8 FixedString(32), s9 FixedString(32), s10 FixedString(32), s11 FixedString(32), s12 FixedString(32), s13 FixedString(32), s14 FixedString(32), s15 FixedString(32)) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
CREATE TABLE rs_probe_100m (k UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY tuple()
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO rs_right_100k SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(100000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_10m SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_100k_nullable WITH if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, number) AS n, if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)')) AS fs SELECT number, n, n, n, n, n, n, fs, n FROM numbers(100000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_10m_nullable WITH if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, number) AS n, if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)')) AS fs SELECT number, n, n, n, n, n, n, fs, n FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_1m_x10 SELECT number % 1000000, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)'), number FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_1m_nullable_x10 WITH if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, number) AS n, if(number % 7 = 0, NULL, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(16)')) AS fs SELECT number % 1000000, n, n, n, n, n, n, fs, n FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_right_mixed_10m WITH concat('s', toString(number)) AS s SELECT number, number, number, number, number, s, s, s FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()

INSERT INTO rs_right_wide_10m SELECT number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, number, reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)'), reinterpret(number, 'FixedString(32)') FROM numbers(10000000) ORDER BY rand()
INSERT INTO rs_probe_100m SELECT rand64() FROM numbers(100000000)
test.query: SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l JOIN rs_right_100k r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l JOIN rs_right_100k_nullable r ON (l.k % toUInt64(100000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l JOIN rs_right_10m_nullable r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l FULL JOIN rs_right_10m r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m LIMIT 20000000) l JOIN rs_right_1m_x10 r ON (l.k % toUInt64(1000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m LIMIT 20000000) l JOIN rs_right_1m_nullable_x10 r ON (l.k % toUInt64(1000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l JOIN rs_right_mixed_10m r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null

SELECT * FROM rs_probe_100m l JOIN rs_right_wide_10m r ON (l.k % toUInt64(10000000 / {match_rate})) = r.k FORMAT Null SETTINGS max_bytes_before_external_join = 0, max_bytes_ratio_before_external_join = 0, max_bytes_for_hash_join_row_store = 0
